mapper.select: select * from sys_cost_category where category_id = #{categoryId} and del_flag='0'
select * from sys_cost_category where parent_id = 0 and category_level = 1 and category_name = #{categoryName} and del_flag='0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_cost_category(parent_id, category_name, category_level, order_num, status, unit_price, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values(#{parentId}, #{categoryName}, #{categoryLevel}, #{orderNum}, #{status}, #{unitPrice}, #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy}, now())
mapper.update: update sys_cost_category set del_flag='1' where category_id=#{categoryId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_cost_category where parent_id=#{categoryId} and del_flag='0'
